title: tryphia secunda
intro: Tryphia secunda, also known as the "false dandelion" or "lesser dandelion," is a plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family. The medicinal properties of Tryphia secunda include its ability to act as a diuretic and to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of using this plant include its potential to treat urinary problems, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a natural remedy for fever and digestive issues. Tryphia secunda is traditionally prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it can also be used externally as a poultice or compress.
